title: GitHub - douglascorrea/herdr-agent-inbox: An inbox for your coding agents in herdr — session titles, settle/mark-unread triage, runtimes, workspace rollups, and resumable chat history
excerpt: An inbox for your coding agents in herdr — session titles, settle/mark-unread triage, runtimes, workspace rollups, and resumable chat history - douglascorrea/herdr-agent-inbox
content_html:
herdr-agent-inbox

An inbox for your coding agents. Session titles, settle / mark-unread triage, running times, workspace rollups, and a ChatGPT-style resumable chat history — for every agent running in herdr.

Inspired by T3 Code's "settle" workflow:

"Think of it more like an inbox. When you're done with a thread, click the 'settle' button and it slides to the bottom. This has helped me 'finish' more."

What you get

  • Session titles — every agent pane gets a real title derived from its conversation ("Fix flaky payment webhook tests"), not just claude or a directory name. Reads the agent's native transcript (claude / pi / codex), optionally summarized by any LLM command you configure.
  • Inbox triage — the Agents sidebar becomes an attention queue: blocked → finished-unseen → working → idle → settled at the bottom. Settle an agent when you're done with it; it auto-reopens the moment it works again. Mark one unread to pin it back on top.
  • Chat history that accumulates — closed conversations stay listed under their workspace/directory (and in a global history browser), and the ones with session refs reopen in place with claude --resume / pi --session / codex resume.
  • Running times — how long each session has lived and how long it's been in its current state, live in the sidebar.
  • Workspace rollups — each workspace row shows its agents by state (!1 ●2 ▸1 ⚑3) plus the longest-running busy stint.
  • Sidebar resize — grow/shrink herdr's sidebar from the keyboard (and keep herdr's native mouse-drag working).

Everything runs through herdr's public plugin surface — no fork, no patches, stdlib Python only.

The popup

prefix+i opens the inbox. g rotates four views, h opens history.

Compact — one line per chat, workspace headers with a dominant-state flag:

History — every closed chat, newest first; ↩ means resumable:

Key Action
enter / double-click Focus the agent (or reopen an archived chat)
s / right-click Settle (right-click toggles)
u Mark unread
c Clear settle/unread flag
S Settle every finished agent
r Regenerate the title
g Rotate view: tree → compact → grouped → flat
h Chat history browser
q / esc Close

State legend

🔴 / ! blocked · 🔵 / ● finished, unseen · 🟡 / ▸ working · 🟢 / ○ idle · 🏁 / ⚑ settled · ⚫ closed chat — matching herdr's own sidebar color language (red/teal/yellow/green), in your herdr theme's exact palette.

Install

Requires herdr ≥ 0.7.0 and python3 (3.11+ recommended) on PATH.

herdr plugin install douglascorrea/herdr-agent-inbox

The daemon starts with your session (and a watchdog revives it). Then wire up the display and keys:

Sidebar rows (~/.config/herdr/config.toml)

The plugin reports tokens; your sidebar config decides what renders:

[ui.sidebar.agents]
rows = [
  ["state_icon", "$title"],
  [{ token = "$flag", fg = "#f1fa8c", bold = true }, "agent", "workspace", { token = "$age", dim = true }],
]

[ui.sidebar.spaces]
rows = [
  ["state_icon", "workspace", "$agents", { token = "$busy", dim = true }],
  ["branch", "git_status"],
]

Available pane tokens: $title, $age (session running time), $since (time in current state), $flag (⚑ settled / ● unread). Workspace tokens: $agents (state counts), $busy (longest working stint). Styled custom tokens keep the $ prefix; builtins stay bare.

Keybindings

[[keys.command]]
key = "prefix+m"
type = "shell"
description = "settle agent (slides to bottom of inbox)"
command = "herdr plugin action invoke settle --plugin herdr-agent-inbox"

[[keys.command]]
key = "prefix+shift+m"
type = "shell"
description = "mark agent unread (back to attention tier)"
command = "herdr plugin action invoke unread --plugin herdr-agent-inbox"

[[keys.command]]
key = "prefix+alt+m"
type = "shell"
description = "settle all finished agents in workspace"
command = "herdr plugin action invoke settle-workspace --plugin herdr-agent-inbox"

[[keys.command]]
key = "prefix+i"
type = "shell"
description = "open agent inbox popup"
command = "herdr plugin pane open --plugin herdr-agent-inbox --entrypoint inbox"

[[keys.command]]
key = "prefix+alt+right"
type = "shell"
description = "sidebar wider (+2 cols)"
command = "herdr plugin action invoke sidebar-grow --plugin herdr-agent-inbox"

[[keys.command]]
key = "prefix+alt+left"
type = "shell"
description = "sidebar narrower (-2 cols)"
command = "herdr plugin action invoke sidebar-shrink --plugin herdr-agent-inbox"

Then herdr server reload-config.

Title configuration

<herdr config dir>/plugins/config/herdr-agent-inbox/config.toml (auto-created with comments on first run, hot-reloaded on change):

[title]
source = "first"   # "first" opening prompt | "last" most recent prompt
summarize = false  # pipe the prompt through summarize_cmd for a real title
summarize_cmd = "claude -p --model claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 'Write a 4-8 word title for this coding-agent session request. Output ONLY the title, nothing else.'"
summarize_timeout_secs = 60

source = "last" re-derives the title whenever the agent finishes a turn. Summaries run on an async worker, cached per prompt content (one call per session), falling back to the truncated raw prompt until they land. Agents without transcript refs (e.g. hermes) fall back to their pane/terminal title — which you can override anytime: the inbox's r regenerates, and the set-title control command pins a title of your choosing.

Privacy note: titles are derived from your prompts. They are stored locally (plugin state dir) and rendered in your sidebar. If you enable summarize, prompt excerpts are piped to whatever command you configure — nothing leaves your machine unless that command sends it somewhere.

Sidebar resize

Herdr's effective sidebar width is session state clamped by sidebar_min_width/sidebar_max_width (and herdr natively supports dragging the sidebar's last column with the mouse). The sidebar-grow/sidebar-shrink actions force an exact width by pinning the clamps and immediately relaxing them back to [20, 60], so keyboard and mouse resize coexist. Absolute width: python3 actions.py sidebar 36.

How it works

  • daemon.py — a stdlib-Python daemon started by the plugin's [[startup]] hook. Subscribes to herdr socket events, diffs agent.list, derives titles from native transcripts, and reports pane/workspace metadata plus an agent.view.set inbox sort. Closed chats append to history.jsonl. Settle/unread state lives in state.json, keyed by terminal id, surviving restarts. A control socket serves the actions/TUI.
  • actions.py — the keybindable actions (settle, unread, settle-workspace, retitle, set-title, sidebar resize, restart-daemon).
  • inbox_tui.py — the popup ([[panes]], placement popup) with the four views, mouse support, theme-matched colors, and the history browser. Try it standalone with python3 inbox_tui.py --demo.

State lives next to your herdr session socket in agent-inbox-state/ (state.json, history.jsonl, daemon.log, control socket).

License

MIT

sentences.en: herdr-agent-inbox
sentences.zh: 牧民代理收件箱

blocks.html_en: An inbox for your coding agents. Session titles, settle / mark-unread triage, running times, workspace rollups, and a ChatGPT-style resumable chat history — for every agent running in herdr.

sentences.en: An inbox for your coding agents.
sentences.zh: 您的编码代理的收件箱。

sentences.en: Session titles, settle / mark-unread triage, running times, workspace rollups, and a ChatGPT-style resumable chat history — for every agent running in herdr.
sentences.zh: 会话标题、结算/标记为未读分类、运行时间、工作区汇总以及 ChatGPT 风格的可恢复聊天历史记录 - 适用于在 herdr 中运行的每个代理。

blocks.html_en: Inspired by T3 Code's "settle" workflow:

sentences.en: Inspired by T3 Code's "settle" workflow:
sentences.zh: 受到 T3 Code 的“结算”工作流程的启发：

blocks.html_en: "Think of it more like an inbox. When you're done with a thread, click the 'settle' button and it slides to the bottom. This has helped me 'finish' more."

sentences.en: "Think of it more like an inbox.
sentences.zh: “把它想象成一个收件箱。

sentences.en: When you're done with a thread, click the 'settle' button and it slides to the bottom.
sentences.zh: 当你完成一个线程后，点击“解决”按钮，它就会滑到底部。

sentences.en: This has helped me 'finish' more."
sentences.zh: 这帮助我‘完成’了更多。”

blocks.html_en: "Think of it more like an inbox. When you're done with a thread, click the 'settle' button and it slides to the bottom. This has helped me 'finish' more."

sentences.en: "Think of it more like an inbox.
sentences.zh: “把它想象成一个收件箱。

sentences.en: When you're done with a thread, click the 'settle' button and it slides to the bottom.
sentences.zh: 当你完成一个线程后，点击“解决”按钮，它就会滑到底部。

sentences.en: This has helped me 'finish' more."
sentences.zh: 这帮助我‘完成’了更多。”

blocks.html_en: What you get

sentences.en: What you get
sentences.zh: 你得到什么

blocks.html_en: • Session titles — every agent pane gets a real title derived from its conversation ("Fix flaky payment webhook tests"), not just claude or a directory name. Reads the agent's native transcript (claude / pi / codex), optionally summarized by any LLM command you configure.

sentences.en: Session titles — every agent pane gets a real title derived from its conversation ("Fix flaky payment webhook tests"), not just claude or a directory name.
sentences.zh: 会话标题 - 每个代理窗格都会从其对话中获得一个真实的标题（“修复不稳定的支付 Webhook 测试”），而不仅仅是 claude 或目录名称。

sentences.en: Reads the agent's native transcript (claude / pi / codex), optionally summarized by any LLM command you configure.
sentences.zh: 读取代理的本机记录 (claude / pi / codex)，可以选择由您配置的任何 LLM 命令进行汇总。

blocks.html_en: • Inbox triage — the Agents sidebar becomes an attention queue: blocked → finished-unseen → working → idle → settled at the bottom. Settle an agent when you're done with it; it auto-reopens the moment it works again. Mark one unread to pin it back on top.

sentences.en: Inbox triage — the Agents sidebar becomes an attention queue: blocked → finished-unseen → working → idle → settled at the bottom.
sentences.zh: 收件箱分类——代理侧边栏变成了一个关注队列：阻塞→已完成但未见→正在工作→空闲→位于底部。

sentences.en: Settle an agent when you're done with it; it auto-reopens the moment it works again.
sentences.zh: 办完事后找代理；它再次工作时会自动重新打开。

sentences.en: Mark one unread to pin it back on top.
sentences.zh: 将一篇标记为未读，将其钉回顶部。

blocks.html_en: • Chat history that accumulates — closed conversations stay listed under their workspace/directory (and in a global history browser), and the ones with session refs reopen in place with claude --resume / pi --session / codex resume.

sentences.en: Chat history that accumulates — closed conversations stay listed under their workspace/directory (and in a global history browser), and the ones with session refs reopen in place with claude --resume / pi --session / codex resume.
sentences.zh: 累积的聊天历史记录 - 已关闭的对话保留在其工作区/目录下（以及全局历史浏览器中）列出，而具有会话引用的对话则使用 claude --resume / pi --session / codexresume 重新打开。

blocks.html_en: • Running times — how long each session has lived and how long it's been in its current state, live in the sidebar.

sentences.en: Running times — how long each session has lived and how long it's been in its current state, live in the sidebar.
sentences.zh: 运行时间——每个会话的持续时间以及当前状态的持续时间，均显示在侧边栏中。

blocks.html_en: • Workspace rollups — each workspace row shows its agents by state (!1 ●2 ▸1 ⚑3) plus the longest-running busy stint.

sentences.en: Workspace rollups — each workspace row shows its agents by state (!1 ●2 ▸1 ⚑3) plus the longest-running busy stint.
sentences.zh: 工作区汇总 — 每个工作区行按状态显示其代理 (!1 ●2 ▸1 ⚑3) 以及运行时间最长的繁忙时段。

blocks.html_en: • Sidebar resize — grow/shrink herdr's sidebar from the keyboard (and keep herdr's native mouse-drag working).

sentences.en: Sidebar resize — grow/shrink herdr's sidebar from the keyboard (and keep herdr's native mouse-drag working).
sentences.zh: 调整侧边栏大小 — 通过键盘增大/缩小 herdr 的侧边栏（并保持 herdr 的本机鼠标拖动功能正常工作）。

blocks.html_en: Everything runs through herdr's public plugin surface — no fork, no patches, stdlib Python only.

sentences.en: Everything runs through herdr's public plugin surface — no fork, no patches, stdlib Python only.
sentences.zh: 一切都通过 herdr 的公共插件界面运行——没有分叉，没有补丁，只有 stdlib Python。

sentences.zh: 标题配置

blocks.html_en: <herdr config dir>/plugins/config/herdr-agent-inbox/config.toml (auto-created with comments on first run, hot-reloaded on change):

sentences.en: <herdr config dir>/plugins/config/herdr-agent-inbox/config.toml (auto-created with comments on first run, hot-reloaded on change):
sentences.zh: <herdr config dir>/plugins/config/herdr-agent-inbox/config.toml（首次运行时使用注释自动创建，更改时热重新加载）：

blocks.html_en: source = "last" re-derives the title whenever the agent finishes a turn. Summaries run on an async worker, cached per prompt content (one call per session), falling back to the truncated raw prompt until they land. Agents without transcript refs (e.g. hermes) fall back to their pane/terminal title — which you can override anytime: the inbox's r regenerates, and the set-title control command pins a title of your choosing.

sentences.en: source = "last" re-derives the title whenever the agent finishes a turn.
sentences.zh: 每当智能体完成一个回合时，source = "last" 就会重新导出标题。

sentences.en: Summaries run on an async worker, cached per prompt content (one call per session), falling back to the truncated raw prompt until they land.
sentences.zh: 摘要在异步工作线程上运行，缓存每个提示内容（每个会话一次调用），回退到截断的原始提示，直到它们落地。

sentences.en: Agents without transcript refs (e.g. hermes) fall back to their pane/terminal title — which you can override anytime: the inbox's r regenerates, and the set-title control command pins a title of your choosing.
sentences.zh: 没有转录参考的代理（例如 Hermes）会回退到其窗格/终端标题 - 您可以随时覆盖该标题：收件箱的 r 重新生成，并且 set-title 控制命令会固定您选择的标题。

blocks.html_en: Privacy note: titles are derived from your prompts. They are stored locally (plugin state dir) and rendered in your sidebar. If you enable summarize, prompt excerpts are piped to whatever command you configure — nothing leaves your machine unless that command sends it somewhere.

sentences.en: Privacy note: titles are derived from your prompts.
sentences.zh: 隐私说明：标题来自您的提示。

sentences.en: They are stored locally (plugin state dir) and rendered in your sidebar.
sentences.zh: 它们存储在本地（插件状态目录）并呈现在侧边栏中。

sentences.en: If you enable summarize, prompt excerpts are piped to whatever command you configure — nothing leaves your machine unless that command sends it somewhere.
sentences.zh: 如果您启用汇总，提示摘录将通过管道传输到您配置的任何命令 - 除非该命令将其发送到某个地方，否则任何内容都不会离开您的计算机。

blocks.html_en: Sidebar resize

sentences.en: Sidebar resize
sentences.zh: 调整侧边栏大小

blocks.html_en: Herdr's effective sidebar width is session state clamped by sidebar_min_width/sidebar_max_width (and herdr natively supports dragging the sidebar's last column with the mouse). The sidebar-grow/sidebar-shrink actions force an exact width by pinning the clamps and immediately relaxing them back to [20, 60], so keyboard and mouse resize coexist. Absolute width: python3 actions.py sidebar 36.

sentences.en: Herdr's effective sidebar width is session state clamped by sidebar_min_width/sidebar_max_width (and herdr natively supports dragging the sidebar's last column with the mouse).
sentences.zh: Herdr 的有效侧边栏宽度是由 sidebar_min_width/sidebar_max_width 限制的会话状态（herdr 本身支持用鼠标拖动侧边栏的最后一列）。

sentences.en: The sidebar-grow/sidebar-shrink actions force an exact width by pinning the clamps and immediately relaxing them back to [20, 60], so keyboard and mouse resize coexist.
sentences.zh: 侧边栏增长/侧边栏收缩操作通过固定夹子并立即将其放松回 [20, 60] 来强制精确的宽度，因此键盘和鼠标调整大小可以共存。

sentences.en: Absolute width: python3 actions.py sidebar 36.
sentences.zh: 绝对宽度：python3 actions.py 侧边栏 36。

blocks.html_en: How it works

sentences.en: How it works
sentences.zh: 它是如何运作的

blocks.html_en: • daemon.py — a stdlib-Python daemon started by the plugin's [[startup]] hook. Subscribes to herdr socket events, diffs agent.list, derives titles from native transcripts, and reports pane/workspace metadata plus an agent.view.set inbox sort. Closed chats append to history.jsonl. Settle/unread state lives in state.json, keyed by terminal id, surviving restarts. A control socket serves the actions/TUI.

sentences.en: daemon.py — a stdlib-Python daemon started by the plugin's [[startup]] hook.
sentences.zh: daemon.py — 由插件的 [[startup]] 挂钩启动的 stdlib-Python 守护进程。

sentences.en: Subscribes to herdr socket events, diffs agent.list, derives titles from native transcripts, and reports pane/workspace metadata plus an agent.view.set inbox sort.
sentences.zh: 订阅 herdr 套接字事件、比较 agent.list、从本机记录中派生标题、报告窗格/工作区元数据以及 agent.view.set 收件箱排序。

sentences.en: Closed chats append to history.jsonl.
sentences.zh: 关闭的聊天会附加到history.jsonl。

sentences.en: Settle/unread state lives in state.json, keyed by terminal id, surviving restarts.
sentences.zh: 解决/未读状态存在于 state.json 中，由终端 id 键入，幸存重新启动。

sentences.en: A control socket serves the actions/TUI.
sentences.zh: 控制套接字服务于动作/TUI。

blocks.html_en: • actions.py — the keybindable actions (settle, unread, settle-workspace, retitle, set-title, sidebar resize, restart-daemon).

sentences.en: actions.py — the keybindable actions (settle, unread, settle-workspace, retitle, set-title, sidebar resize, restart-daemon).
sentences.zh: actions.py — 可绑定的操作（设置、未读、设置工作空间、重新标题、设置标题、调整侧边栏大小、重新启动守护进程）。

blocks.html_en: • inbox_tui.py — the popup ([[panes]], placement popup) with the four views, mouse support, theme-matched colors, and the history browser. Try it standalone with python3 inbox_tui.py --demo.

sentences.en: inbox_tui.py — the popup ([[panes]], placement popup) with the four views, mouse support, theme-matched colors, and the history browser.
sentences.zh: inbox_tui.py — 弹出窗口（[[panes]]，放置弹出窗口），具有四个视图、鼠标支持、主题匹配的颜色和历史浏览器。

sentences.en: Try it standalone with python3 inbox_tui.py --demo.
sentences.zh: 使用 python3 inbox_tui.py --demo 独立尝试。

blocks.html_en: State lives next to your herdr session socket in agent-inbox-state/ (state.json, history.jsonl, daemon.log, control socket).

sentences.en: State lives next to your herdr session socket in agent-inbox-state/ (state.json, history.jsonl, daemon.log, control socket).
sentences.zh: 状态位于 agent-inbox-state/ 中的 herdr 会话套接字旁边（state.json、history.jsonl、daemon.log、控制套接字）。

blocks.html_en: License

sentences.en: License
sentences.zh: 执照

blocks.html_en: MIT

content_html_zh:
牧民代理收件箱

您的编码代理的收件箱。 会话标题、结算/标记为未读分类、运行时间、工作区汇总以及 ChatGPT 风格的可恢复聊天历史记录 - 适用于在 herdr 中运行的每个代理。

受到 T3 Code 的“结算”工作流程的启发：

“把它想象成一个收件箱。 当你完成一个线程后，点击“解决”按钮，它就会滑到底部。 这帮助我‘完成’了更多。”

你得到什么

  • 会话标题 - 每个代理窗格都会从其对话中获得一个真实的标题（“修复不稳定的支付 Webhook 测试”），而不仅仅是 claude 或目录名称。 读取代理的本机记录 (claude / pi / codex)，可以选择由您配置的任何 LLM 命令进行汇总。
  • 收件箱分类——代理侧边栏变成了一个关注队列：阻塞→已完成但未见→正在工作→空闲→位于底部。 办完事后找代理；它再次工作时会自动重新打开。 将一篇标记为未读，将其钉回顶部。
  • 累积的聊天历史记录 - 已关闭的对话保留在其工作区/目录下（以及全局历史浏览器中）列出，而具有会话引用的对话则使用 claude --resume / pi --session / codexresume 重新打开。
  • 运行时间——每个会话的持续时间以及当前状态的持续时间，均显示在侧边栏中。
  • 工作区汇总 — 每个工作区行按状态显示其代理 (!1 ●2 ▸1 ⚑3) 以及运行时间最长的繁忙时段。
  • 调整侧边栏大小 — 通过键盘增大/缩小 herdr 的侧边栏（并保持 herdr 的本机鼠标拖动功能正常工作）。

一切都通过 herdr 的公共插件界面运行——没有分叉，没有补丁，只有 stdlib Python。

弹出窗口

prefix+i 打开收件箱。 g 旋转四个视图，h 打开历史记录。

紧凑 — 每个聊天一行，工作区标题带有主导状态标志：

历史记录——每次封闭聊天，最新的在前； ↩ 表示可恢复：

Key 行动
输入/双击 聚焦客服人员（或重新打开存档的聊天）
s / 右键单击 解决（右键切换）
u 标记为未读
c 清除已结算/未读标志
S 结算每一个成品代理
r 重新生成标题
g 旋转视图：树→紧凑→分组→扁平
h 聊天记录浏览器
q / esc Close

国家传奇

🔴 / ! 被阻止 · 🔵 / ● 已完成，看不见 · 🟡 / ▸ 工作 · 🟢 / ○ 闲置 · 🏁 / ⚑ 已解决 · ⚫ 关闭聊天 — 在您的牧人主题的确切调色板中匹配牧人自己的侧边栏颜色语言（红色/青色/黄色/绿色）。

安装

要求 PATH 上有 herdr ≥ 0.7.0 和 python3（推荐 3.11+）。

herdr plugin install douglascorrea/herdr-agent-inbox

守护进程随您的会话启动（并且看门狗恢复它）。 然后连接显示屏和按键：

侧边栏行（~/.config/herdr/config.toml）

该插件报告令牌；您的侧边栏配置决定呈现的内容：

[ui.sidebar.agents]
rows = [
  ["state_icon", "$title"],
  [{ token = "$flag", fg = "#f1fa8c", bold = true }, "agent", "workspace", { token = "$age", dim = true }],
]

[ui.sidebar.spaces]
rows = [
  ["state_icon", "workspace", "$agents", { token = "$busy", dim = true }],
  ["branch", "git_status"],
]

可用的窗格标记：$title、$age（会话运行时间）、$since（当前状态的时间）、$flag（⚑ 已结算/● 未读）。 工作空间令牌：$agents（状态计数）、$busy（最长工作时间）。 样式化的自定义标记保留 $ 前缀；内置函数保持裸露。

键绑定

[[keys.command]]
key = "prefix+m"
type = "shell"
description = "settle agent (slides to bottom of inbox)"
command = "herdr plugin action invoke settle --plugin herdr-agent-inbox"

[[keys.command]]
key = "prefix+shift+m"
type = "shell"
description = "mark agent unread (back to attention tier)"
command = "herdr plugin action invoke unread --plugin herdr-agent-inbox"

[[keys.command]]
key = "prefix+alt+m"
type = "shell"
description = "settle all finished agents in workspace"
command = "herdr plugin action invoke settle-workspace --plugin herdr-agent-inbox"

[[keys.command]]
key = "prefix+i"
type = "shell"
description = "open agent inbox popup"
command = "herdr plugin pane open --plugin herdr-agent-inbox --entrypoint inbox"

[[keys.command]]
key = "prefix+alt+right"
type = "shell"
description = "sidebar wider (+2 cols)"
command = "herdr plugin action invoke sidebar-grow --plugin herdr-agent-inbox"

[[keys.command]]
key = "prefix+alt+left"
type = "shell"
description = "sidebar narrower (-2 cols)"
command = "herdr plugin action invoke sidebar-shrink --plugin herdr-agent-inbox"

然后herdr服务器重新加载配置。

标题配置

<herdr config dir>/plugins/config/herdr-agent-inbox/config.toml（首次运行时使用注释自动创建，更改时热重新加载）：

[title]
source = "first"   # "first" opening prompt | "last" most recent prompt
summarize = false  # pipe the prompt through summarize_cmd for a real title
summarize_cmd = "claude -p --model claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 'Write a 4-8 word title for this coding-agent session request. Output ONLY the title, nothing else.'"
summarize_timeout_secs = 60

每当智能体完成一个回合时，source = "last" 就会重新导出标题。 摘要在异步工作线程上运行，缓存每个提示内容（每个会话一次调用），回退到截断的原始提示，直到它们落地。 没有转录参考的代理（例如 Hermes）会回退到其窗格/终端标题 - 您可以随时覆盖该标题：收件箱的 r 重新生成，并且 set-title 控制命令会固定您选择的标题。

隐私说明：标题来自您的提示。 它们存储在本地（插件状态目录）并呈现在侧边栏中。 如果您启用汇总，提示摘录将通过管道传输到您配置的任何命令 - 除非该命令将其发送到某个地方，否则任何内容都不会离开您的计算机。

调整侧边栏大小

Herdr 的有效侧边栏宽度是由 sidebar_min_width/sidebar_max_width 限制的会话状态（herdr 本身支持用鼠标拖动侧边栏的最后一列）。 侧边栏增长/侧边栏收缩操作通过固定夹子并立即将其放松回 [20, 60] 来强制精确的宽度，因此键盘和鼠标调整大小可以共存。 绝对宽度：python3 actions.py 侧边栏 36。

它是如何运作的

  • daemon.py — 由插件的 [[startup]] 挂钩启动的 stdlib-Python 守护进程。 订阅 herdr 套接字事件、比较 agent.list、从本机记录中派生标题、报告窗格/工作区元数据以及 agent.view.set 收件箱排序。 关闭的聊天会附加到history.jsonl。 解决/未读状态存在于 state.json 中，由终端 id 键入，幸存重新启动。 控制套接字服务于动作/TUI。
  • actions.py — 可绑定的操作（设置、未读、设置工作空间、重新标题、设置标题、调整侧边栏大小、重新启动守护进程）。
  • inbox_tui.py — 弹出窗口（[[panes]]，放置弹出窗口），具有四个视图、鼠标支持、主题匹配的颜色和历史浏览器。 使用 python3 inbox_tui.py --demo 独立尝试。

状态位于 agent-inbox-state/ 中的 herdr 会话套接字旁边（state.json、history.jsonl、daemon.log、控制套接字）。

执照

MIT
